emails.subject: Re: Seminole Indian Tribe Project
emails.body: Re: Seminole Indian Tribe Project By the way, Bryant's bill should go to Marchris, not you. Marchris will know that.

emails.body: Re: Seminole Indian Tribe Project Believe you me, I have no intent of accepting any such invoice. Carlos Sole' Senior Counsel Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-8191 (phone) 713 646-3393 (fax)
